title: It doesn't matter what happens to you — react maxim (2019)
html:
It doesn't matter what happens to you — react maxim (2019)

Source: 2019-11-09 Apple Note. Two-line maxim with a DaBaby attribution. Recurrence of the same axiom from the 2019 10 16 note three weeks earlier.

TL;DR

  • "It doesn't matter what happens to you, it matters how you react — in both senses, negative AND positive" — the both-sides clarification is new (you can also fumble a good event by under-reacting).
  • DaBaby (or "someone") quote: "let a year go by and missing the opportunity in front of one" — pop-culture sourcing of the same lesson; opportunity-missed is a kind of fumble too.
  • Repeat capture pattern: same maxim 3 weeks apart suggests Yahir is in the early reps of internalizing, not just collecting. Foundation phase of the manifesto style note genre.
  • This expanded both-sides framing carries forward into the walk with gods eyes practice: react to good as fully as you react to bad.

Connections

  • 2019 10 16 life meaningless without pursuit — earlier identical capture
  • 2024 09 12 never forget manifesto — later canonical version
  • walk with gods eyes
  • disconnected from outcome
